docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, THOMAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00, TIME WAIVER.
